channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: Anyone else getting the itch? — 96 replies — 384.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Anyone else getting the itch?

Open thread • Replies: 96 • Updated: 2026-03-04 23:27 UTC

OP

The big boys'll go back up, that's guaranteed money. But some others will 10x, 100x, 1000x. I'm feelin' like it's SHIB's turn.

Early replies (first 3)

61900851
>>61899833
Checked

61900872
>>61899833
I'll just keep buying small amounts of it for the rest of my life, and see what happens.

61900948
>>61899833
i believe in shib

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61922014
>>61922004

61922070
>>61922004
You have 2 more weeks wagie

61922078
I hope you don’t buy toad

61922734
No one is buying toad in a shib thread! Shib is going to 14x to ath and toad will go to zero. Shib already has an etf coming and toad has desperate curry flavored shills. LMAO!

61923250
>>61922734
When toad moons YOU'RE going to seethe, when toad moons YOU'RE going to rope!

61923260
>>61899833
I am in anon, people are too stupid to skip this one.
And some Doge in case the elom makes a comeback.

61924787
>>61922734
See
>>61922014

61926036
>>61899833
This thread smells like curry and shit.

Also, shibaggies holding their shibags to zero.

61926122
>>61926036
>This thread smells like curry and shit.
So like most threads on /biz ?

>>61926036
>Also, shibaggies holding their shibags to zero.
Sure buddy. The number 1 meme on eth is going to zero goy!

61927655
>>61926122
>The number 1 meme on eth is going to zero goy!
i'm genuinely considering dumping the rest of what i hold because of this post

61927803
>>61927655
Checked dump it

61927812
>>61899833
you will be lucky to get a 3x

61927816
>>61927812
Shib is ez 10x bear case 33x bull case

61927892
>>61927816
Never happening

61928058
>>61927892
>Shib will never go to a place it’s been before because it just won’t.
You sound tarded bro

61928094
>>61928058
It only went there because of insane hype and FOMO. It will never happen again unless Elon makes it the official currency of X or something

61928421
>>61927655
Please do fud chud. I like cheapies.
>>61927812
>>61928094
He didn't buy cheap before the etf and clarity act passed.
>NGMI!

61929970
> shib niggers in this thread ignoring the most obvious 1000-3000x token right in front of them

61931432
>>61929970
Its no use anon. These people like being poor. Sit back and hodl and wait for the fireworks.

61931717
Shib is positive returns for evm daily trade bots. Over 60% positive returns. So far they’re all trading at above 50% positive returns for bot trading. What ever happened to shiba sex? Still a general.

61931779
This thread makes me so happy, I thought all my Shibros had abandoned /biz/ forever...we're back in full force!

61932425
While retards in the chat slurping a shitcoin that’s already over 5 years olde, the smart money is dropping at least .2 eff on toad, just sitting back watching the drama unfold

61934414
50x

61934942
it begins...

61935122
Toads invade shib threads because its a zero volume zero interest and zero attention, its been a shit coin since early 2023. 1.9k holders that want to kys. Lol, lmao even.

61935440
>>61931779
SHIB blessing thread anon still here, i'm still here waiting for the time and it's going to happen

61936417
>>61935122
No u. Toad holders are going to make it.

61936442
my itch is on cheese, already bottomed only upwards from here

61936453
>>61936442
No fuck off with that jeet scam. Toad is not a jeet scam it's an Israeli/US government scam.

61937292
>>61899833
Luna never got a crack last time

item.title: Reminder even 100 million NW is not generational wealth worthy — 64 replies — 256.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Reminder even 100 million NW is not generational wealth worthy

Open thread • Replies: 64 • Updated: 2026-03-04 23:30 UTC

OP

Reminder even 100 million NW is not generational wealth worthy

Early replies (first 3)

61931291
This is just a coon who doesn't understand investments and compounding returns.

61931302
>>61931288
Probably bought a bunch of houses and cars that he couldn't afford the maintenance and taxes on

61931311
>>61931302
>>61931291
>>61931288
He's right though

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61932440
>>61931311
>>61931288
he should have let his white masta manage his money for him, then he wouldnt be deal with these issue.

61932444
>>61931311
how else am i as a famous person going to hush all the women i raped and the minors i molested, as well as pay my lawer when this shit inevitably hits the fan?

61932449
>>61932020
It's less actually hes in the top bracket so 37% federal, 10% for new york, 3.7% for nyc that's over half his income stolen by the government before his agent gets his gibs

61932469
He made 1 million dollars a month. All he had to do was put half in an index fund. Use the other half to lease cars, rent a mansion and chimp out

61932474
>>61932469
btw he probably did commercials, and had sponsorships wtf lmao.

61932492
>>61932474
The nigger ball player is the peak example why you cant just give people money and expect it to wildly improve their lives. Sure maybe 10% or even 15% of homelessness is caused by external factors out of their control. But the vast majority of people in general only operate on a surface level thinking.

61932506
When you’re publicly rich, every single thing l.e. forces you to pay for. Every single word out of your mouth costs a dollar amount. Every single social interaction the other person has to get paid for.

61932528
>>61931311
if you all are going be jewish like this, why not just say 12m instead of 120m
>retards

61932553
>>61931312
> 1 in 10 Americans are millionaires
That's over 35 million millionaires
There's enough millionaires in America to fill up a megacity
Historically speaking that's outrageous

61932636
>>61931311
>>61931288
>>61931960
They account for this in the drafting/management of players. Ones who spend/save/invest wisely are a threat to the business model, because they throw water on the spectacle and are also way more likely to hold the leagues/players associations to account. If players come out of their careers independently wealthy, they can't be controlled by the unions. The NBA had a dude like this and he caused all kinds of headaches for owners.
If you refuse to play the "flaunt" game and act like you've got some sense with your money, you start to see opportunities disappear. You can only have but so many players who are set and can go, "Yeah, I'ma go free agent and head where I'm treated best," before the business model has to change.
It's all about control. They love guys like this one because they show that the protocol works for their purposes. People will continue to end up where they're placed until they wake up and stop taking what they're given without thinking deeply about the situation and acting accordingly.
Honestly, this also applies to many professions where there's pressure to be profligate. This is the reason why. You're supposed to live beyond your means because it's part of the plan to keep you at least predictable, if not out-right controlled. So I don't really fault people for falling for it.

61932694
>>61931288
Athletes in general get raped (financially) all the time. Too many bottom feeders holding out their hands going 'gimme' then chimping out when told no. The only one that's managed to get away with that is Manny Pacquaio and that's because he lives in third world Phillipines where a dollar is like a million pesos to them.

Evander Holyfield had to fight deep into his 40s despite making 250+ million dollars because he was retarded and bought an uber mansion with tons of cars and had tons of babies with different mamas and they all wanted 5 figure child support because women don't care about men, even their fathers.

Adrien Broner is deep in debt and yet his last paycheck he went out and partied. Athlete's are retarded with money bottom line and too many people from managers to agents to finance guys to so called friends and families see them as nothing more then a bank account their entitled to.

61932710
>>61931967
It's worse in boxing. Say you make a 100 grand for a fight. Your promoter gets a percent right off the top. So does your manager, and maybe your coach too. Percentages vary but I've seen promoter and manager percentages go as high as 30%. Then you pay your cutman and second, then you pay your training camp (if its away from home) and sparring partners. Then you pay whatever nutritionist and S&C coach, your publicist, flight, fees, etc. and taxes. At the end you're looking at far less then what you earned on paper. Bernard Hopkins said his first million payday only 50% actually made it into his bank account.

61932753
>>61931288

61932881
>>61932528
>why not let the goyim know their 17 dollar an hour job is actually 9 dollars an hour after taxes and reductions

61933005
>>61931288
Why are you faggots obsessed with "generational" wealth? Even if you raise your children perfectly, it is only a matter of a few generations down the line before they become decadent and lose your fortune. At most just provide them a beater car, a starter house, and pay for their education.

61933411
>>61931288
they could give him 100 billion and he'd still go bankrupt
funny how you only see this with blacks, everyone else seems to have little issue managing money

61934349
>>61933005
>just let all the other groups that hate you have wealth and status bro

61934356
>>61931967
you can't read?

61934424
>>61933005
Black people love catchy sayings like "generational wealth", especially TV blacks. They get any kind of money and recognition and then they want to larp as Malcom X for some reason, even if they still do nigga shit like having baby mommas and getting arrested.

61934468
>>61932022

Rookies also go through a league mandated financial education class to help prevent the bankruptcies. Just really hard to get someone in the USA to understand temporality

61934564
>>61932553
Theres 8 billion niggas on earth
There are probably 10 million boomers worth over 1 million in california alone because of their houses they bought in the 90s at a quarter of the current valuation

61934569
>>61931288
But a Bieber BBC BJ is priceless

61934572
>>61934349
the shitmigrants around me definitely dont have generational wealth,,, theyre more of a nuisance .....

61934605
aren't there like black wealth managers or family offices for these retards in some place like atlanta, it would be a good way to get rich

61934641
>>61931311
oh man only $12 million a year, how do these poor oppressed black men survive on so little? with such tiny paychecks you won't even have any money left to invest after paying your bills

61934654
Most people don't know how to adjust after living like this. He's getting paid 20M a year, and he isn't going to be paid 20M a year for long. Even if he invests it well, he still isn't going to go back to 20M a year.

61934927
>>61931288
>niggerball player is bad with money, can't survive on a measly $100 million
This is why white people need to pay reparations. There are millions of niggers just like this in this country living hand to mouth because of racism. How is little Jayquerius expected to afford his malt liquor and hennessy in these conditions?

61937100
>>61934424
But here it is mostly white men who want to give the ideal trad upbringing to their children and make it possible several generations forward without relying on the evil pozzed world too much and for that they need a gajillion dollars.
The trvthpill here is that it is a game of chance. Every generation is a roll of the dice. Just do your best to raise your own family and don't try to plan 10 generations ahead.

61937293
>>61931302
>>61931362
Yup. To blow that much money they:

>Pay off debts of vaguely related friends and family
>Buy friends and family cars and other bling
>Stupidly big properties
>Loads of super cars
>Take an entourage to da club
>Hookers and blow

It's not to say $12M a year isn't a lot of money. But supporting a stupidly large lifestyle for 20 people going all out is only barely feasible for that.

If you just lived with your family and had a nice property or three and went to a nice wine store for your Dom Perignon and took yourself and the missus out to three star Michelin restaurants and flew first/business class and paid for housekeepers and gardeners and an assistant and bought a Patek for yourself and the lady once a year you totally could.

61937296
>>61931288
You have to be a genuine dumbass to be able to spend that amount of money

item.title: This wagie has escaped — 38 replies — 152.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
This wagie has escaped

Open thread • Replies: 38 • Updated: 2026-03-04 23:36 UTC

OP

I did it anons. I escaped the wagie cage, work offered me a redundancy thinking i would say no and ask to be redployed in another shitty role.
The HR roastie was visibly shaken. "But anon, the market is tough right now!" After 15 years i have paid off all debt and saved plus will be 200k after tax redundancy.

After selling my house, this will give me enough to retire in SEA. Fuck waging.

Early replies (first 3)

61933494
>>61933477
kek

61933581
>>61933477
The Light abandons no man

61933627
>>61933477
>retire in SEA
ehhhhhhhhhh

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61933873
>>61933866
It can't be worse than here

61933885
>>61933477
>The HR roastie was visibly shaken.
>called their bluff
absolutely based, anon. good work

61933899
>>61933873
It can.

61933939
>>61933899
Anon I'm starting to suspect you're either a white woman, a redditor or an asian man ass blasted about white boys mogging them at home.

61934421
>>61933899
it really can't. retiring in a LCOL area in america means you're surrounded by niggers with shit weather or you're surrounded by mayo monkey meth addicts with shit weather. living in a tropical third world country and occasionally getting some jungle gook pussy is infinitely superior.

61934436
>>61933939
fuck it, good luck to you buddy, stick to the plan, make it happen by eoy.

61934459
>>61933627
I swear there is an entire campaign op to discourage young men from doing this
>”Youll never fit in!!”
Yeah no shit not there to fit in
>everyone there will just use you for money!
Everyone here uses me for money
>You don’t speak the language!
I’m not trying to be Thai/Viet/Cambodian I’m trying no to live cheap by the beach in a touristy area where all the people I need to interact with are expats or have some working knowledge of English anyways if the don’t I can’t pay them off
>FINE YOURE A FUCKING LOSER ANYWAYS JUST STAY HERE YOU CREEP!
Don’t care

61934548
>>61933477
>quick! wagie has escaped his cagie!
>use your business and finance knowledge to re-trap him!

61934549
>>61933477
SEA might be on fire soon bro, careful there. What Taiwan kicks off Singapore might start lighting up like Dubai

61935462
>>61933477
You sound like a two digits IQ idealistic faggot but I admire your balls.
t. 44 years old NEET self-sustained god that has been neeting since his early twenties

61935470
I have like 2m and still feel poor

61935590
>>61933477
Fuck you cock sucker motherfucker AAAAGGGGGHHHHHHHH

61935647
>>61933725
In Eastern Europe? Fucking retard you can buy a $30k commie apartment and live with $800 per month and your propriety will also grow in value over time and I'm not talking some shithole like Moldova where having $500 in your pocket makes you rich.
Why the fuck are you paying $1500 per month to live in SEA and live with browns? That will turn into $2000 soon then $2500 and so on.

61935688
>>61935647
where in eastern europe?

61935716
>>61935647
Do they really let foreigners buy in those places?
Will they give me citizenship?
Are all those countries full of sociopathic emotionless corrupt people like Russians?

61935721
>>61933477
Congrats on the escape. I hope I can too but for now I’m happy some anon has freed themselves.

61935822
>>61933866
best advice in this thread
>>61933899
Check out a few different places around the world before you decide to commit to just one.
With over a million you can easily dump it into dividend/income focused ETFs and retire to a modest life pretty much anymore you want. SEA is selling yourself short.

61935846
>>61935716
>noooo people aren't smiling for no reason all the time, they're literally insane
You're not fit to live with slavs, stick to Latin America

61935869
>>61935647
lol dipshit, does all your knowledge of russia come from /pol/ and fox jews?
Every intelligent russian with money is fleeing that shithole and telling people in the west about how fucking horrible and utter shit it was, meanwhile you have turbo virgins who spend all their time crying on the internet and sucking trump's dick trying to convince you it's some white paradise.
I hope you migrate over there and get raped by an arab or central asian mongoloid.

61936723
You will love it... till you don't know what to do next. And then you'll start a bar (and usually fail like many farangs), find that you are out of money and you'll be worried what else to do
till you will be back to work.

61936931
>>61936723
There’s so many ass blasted cucks here. What do you think all the thirdies taking all the jobs do when they work in America? They send the money back home and then leave the country when they have enough to be rich and retire over there. Heaven forbid an American who actually worked for his money leaves

61936945
>>61933862
1mill is made it point for me at like lowest of standards I'd accept so yeah thats it enjoy

61937074
>>61936945
He’s not planning on living in America retard.

61937111
>>61933725
>>61933844
Thats 13 years worth of poverty wages anon. You're gonna have a bad time. Unless you plan to put it in a high yield divvy stock or savings acct and live off the interest.

61937117
>>61933862
Oh ok. Plus a mill I mean sure yeah, go nuts. Living off the interest not principal is still a good idea though. You can live like a kang... in America even in one of the poorer states, off that kind of scratch.

61937202
>>61933477
How do you even retire in sea? Won't you get scammed there?

61937294
>>61937074
Yeah with 1mill im not affording america anhwhere not that theres anything to afford here since its all shit

61937302
>>61935688
NTA, but $1500 is close to median pay in Poland after taxes.

61937315
>>61937302
What east europe places are safe to live in when you have 15k worth of electronics

61937321
>>61937202
What im wondering is how hes planning to stay there. I personally would move to sk permanently but visas are a thing. I only got eu/us nationality

item.title: Day 1651 of snailposting every day until BTC is at 1M — 27 replies — 108.0/hr

Day 1651 of snailposting every day until BTC is at 1M

OP

Day 1651 of snailposting every day until BTC is at 1M

Early replies (first 3)

61923092
>>61922023
cute

61923504
>>61922023

61924383
>>61922023
>>61923092
>>61923504
fake, fraud and gay

kys

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61925449
sssssssssssssnail

61926051
>>61924383
i find it humorous you have a cactus consistently stuck in your anus

61926083
PIECE OF SHIT

61927067
s n a i l
n
a
i
l

61928078
>>61926051
I find it humorous that you have a big red dildo up your anus.

61928117
Yu can do it!

61928272
>>61928078
the price never went more than 5% against my entry, that is a spectacular catch

61930807
slippery lil snail

61930922
>>61922023
>>61913899
You missed posting one for 2/28.
Here's your 2/27: >>61913899
>Day 1650
Here's your 3/01: >>61922023
>Day 1651
Here's your 3/02: >>61927118
>Day 1652

No 2/28 in existence, it should have been 1651 in your sequence but instead you made that post on 3/01.

61932156
>>61930922
The snail has skipped many days.
Can't even keep the count consistent, much less the goal.
Total fraud.

>>61928272
You're gonna keep up this cope even when it drops below 50k aren't you?

61932188
skipping snail snoozing

61932574
fake and gay

61932618
lies

61932664
snailplague

61933339
day 2 of snailbumping every day until the ’log is nothing but snailposting

61934029
>>61932156
based bobo

61934320
sssnailed

61934670
so salty

61935142
up

61935380
good morning mister snail

61935523
bump

61936233
this is now a snail board

61936748
uup

61937282
>>61922023

item.title: Every normie in the world is buying stocks right now. — 17 replies — 68.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Every normie in the world is buying stocks right now.

Open thread • Replies: 17 • Updated: 2026-03-04 23:39 UTC

OP

Every normie in the world is buying stocks right now. And they are all in some basket of Mag7 + 1-2 US midcap of choice. That's it.

Early replies (first 3)

61937097
I also very commonly see my Uber drivers checking their Robinhood or Binance account when waiting behind a red light.
Trust me, look out for this sign yourself.

61937110
Yeah I realized that too and it has me spooked. I realized I only got into shit in 2020 when I suddenly had time and money to research it. I remember last summer some little intern bitch at the bank I used to work at talking to some fat black chick who insisted that XRP was going to 5 dollars (no clue why ever fucking idiot is always attracted to XRP) and her zoomer friend with the broccoli hair talking about how he invested 10 bucks in efferiumz and had made like a 10 dollar profit or something like it was amazing, which was funny because at the time I had a 20,000 dollar unrealized profit on -some shitcoin. Made me afraid that we're near the top and penniless retards are getting All In with their less than 100 dollar investment accounts. I did enjoy randomly flipping stocks on my phone on my breaks at that job. Felt good to be making less than 200 bucks a day (that job paid shit) and then sell some shit for 1200 bucks and feel like a bigshot while driving home.

61937203
>>61937097
Let me guess, its not crypto.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61937211
>they are all in some basket of Mag7 + 1-2 US midcap of choice
So literally VOO

61937217
>>61937110
>xrp attracting retards
Literally never fails, they’re all on the crypto scam side of YouTube where some 85iq 45 year old rambles on about schizo bullshit

61937220
>>61937110
>>61937217
BOOOOOOOOOOOOOOM

61937227
>>61937211
It used to be
>US stock etf + some international etf + bonds
Then it was
>S&P500 etf
Now people only handpick individual stocks.
>Some tech stocks and a random lesser known one that they heard hype about

61937254
>>61937227
I only do VOO and bitcoin. I’m kind of exhausted with chasing hype.

61937265
>>61937254
Literally everyone in the world has piled into the S&P500 at this point. Do you have some international at all?

61937298
>>61937265
Yeah, no. Would rather go down with the ship than send money overseas to make some money.

61937303
the trend is only going to go up. you're using old world logic. every kid born in the past 20 years has a smartphone in their mouth to teeth with and as they grow up an get jobs they have instant access to real time data and investing tools no gen prior had which means every nanosecond another wave of investors aping into the markets and making the trend line go up. face it your edgelord doom and gloom views don't work anymore. you're not a unique snowflake with some inside track nobody else has. you're investing in rugpull memes and will lose all your money while normies make 20% apy MINIMUM. And compounds. they get rich you get poor and dumb. you're a victim of your own self inflected and delusional belief of superiority

61937306
>>61937298
Or you can invest overseas and later sell to take away profits from there to the US

61937325
>>61937072
This is why the retail investing success my gen x parents enjoyed won't be possible for me, especially with the eventual rise of individual trading AI. Also the make it amount keeps increasing the more and more people make it. It's over

61937327
>>61937110
I know right. Reminds me of my shoe polisher. Nigger couldn't shut his mouth for 5 seconds about bitcoin. Talking about how it would go to 1,000,000+ dollars because it was digital gold and that it was bullish that Epstein funded developers and invested in Blockstream and Bitcoin.

One thing was weird though and I didn't knew it at that time. But he said that Bitachon = trust in Hebrew and that BTC is also trust. He then started saying that many jews, like David Chaum, for example were pioneers in these digital currencies because for their Mosiach (Antichrist for Christians) to arrive, there has to be no more psychical cash.
He then continued that Epstein claimed in his email that XRP is a competitor and thus the shoe polisher hated XRP also.

Made me afraid that BTC will never go beyond 100k again because all the retards are buying like 0.001 BTC. I did enjoy randomly shorting Chainlink on my phone sitting on the beach with my Margarita.

61937331
>>61937303
ok boomer

61937339
>>61937303
If all those normies "get rich", none of them will be however. Rich is a relative thing.

61937340
>>61937227
Nobody above room temp iq fell for the international or bond memes

Open thread • Replies: 2 • Updated: 2026-03-04 23:39 UTC

item.title: >BTC? you're just betting that a bigger retard will pay you more than you did why aren't people as angry about this conc… — 29 replies — 92.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
>BTC? you're just betting that a bigger retard will pay you more than you did why aren't people as angry about this conc…

Open thread • Replies: 29 • Updated: 2026-03-04 23:21 UTC

OP

>BTC? you're just betting that a bigger retard will pay you more than you did
why aren't people as angry about this concept when the question is about gold? because cryptos have given too much "underserved" wealth to some people?

Early replies (first 3)

61936302
>>61936177
At least BTC serves an actual function. 95% of the bullion that gets traded around to spergs will never ever be smelted down and used for its conductive properties.
BTC is a currency, and you're still using it as one even if you're just saving with it.

61936315
>>61936302
>At least BTC serves an actual function.
>says this and compares ponzi fake ultrafiat "money" to GOLD
biggest fucktard I've seen on /biz/ this whole week possibly

61936320
>>61936315
my original point is that gold as an investment is motivated excactly the same as BTC, it's just more conservative and tested. BTC is just gold on steroids, the fundamental idea isn't far off.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61936323
>>61936315
>ultrafiat
But enough about gold, which needs IOUs to function as a "currency".
Crypto won. Metaltards stay eternally seething.

61936395
>>61936177
gold has intrinsic value, we make things out of gold purely because it looks pretty. If modern civilization collapsed tomorrow I could still trade my gold for goods and services like we have done for thousands of years. My btc, not so much.

61936416
>>61936395
gold's practical use explains 5% of its market value. besides that fraction, all the points about perceived value apply the same to bitcoin. the latter is obviously younger being a child of the internet age.

>le societal collapse
you got your gold physically with you right now? good for you then. i know i won't be betting on that outcome myself.

61936421
>>61936323
But you can't get btc physical?

61936438
>>61936416
the point isn't to pour all your net worth into gold but to have a safety net. My point is unlike bitcoin you can't become the greater fool buy buying physical gold.

61936444
>>61936421
Better, you get it in it's energy form.

61936469
>>61936315
He’s literally right though

Refute him without sounding mad.

61936479
>>61936438
If your pour all of your wealth into gold you actually brick yourself. You lose 5% right off the bat, put yourself in major risk in the event of a flood or catastrophe, and now are at the mercy of local dealers and spot price when you need to buy.
Even the spergs who go all in on BTC can find vendors that accept it, rapidly convert it to fiat, store it effortlessly, use payment processors that quickswap to fiat, or even get loans for collateral.
>inb4 you sperg out because i mention fiat missing the point entirely

61936512
>>61936479
>the point isn't to pour all your net worth into gold
>the point isn't to pour all your net worth into gold
>the point isn't to pour all your net worth into gold
reading is hard

61936529
>>61936512
Almost like BTC can be used as a currency and gold can't

61936536
>>61936529
this has nothing to do with the argument. Just say you misread what I typed.

61936566
>>61936438
>My point is unlike bitcoin you can't become the greater fool buy buying physical gold.
Of course you can. Don't be silly.

61936574
>>61936536
Why would I use something that no one wants or trades as an emergency fund?
>yes good sir can I please have some good
>here's 1 oz of a shiny rock
>...what do you mean you don't want it!
>ITS FUCKING CONDUCTIVE!
Like nigga ur argument is so dumb that canned corn mogs gold by the same metric
There's better ways to be a doomsdaytard, but we're here for financial solutions assuming there isn't total global nuclear war

61936576
>>61936302
You do realize there is only a limited supply of gold right? You think refineries don’t exist for a reason.

61936605
>>61936576
No, I actually thought gold was infinite. This changes everything.

61936642
>>61936574
this has nothing to do with the argument. Just say you misread what I typed.

61936655
>>61936642
>the point isn't to pour all your net worth into gold but to have a safety net.
>safety net
I did tho, ur just dumb

61936664
>me: the point isn't to pour all your net worth into gold
>you: here's why putting all your net worth into gold is bad
there is nothing more I can do for you

61936686
>>61936664
>me: the point isn't to pour all your net worth into gold
You can me this point about anything, yet that doesn't mean that you should invest in that.
For example: the point isn't to pour all your net worth into bonds
So should you hold bonds?

61936694
>>61936664
I addressed your original concern. Your entire argument is predicated on BTC having no fiat valuation, and gold is somehow divorced from the consequences of its fiat valuation. Your argument is ontologically invalid, and I'm not even sure what that word means, but I think its the right one to use.

61936781
>>61936769
except gold is legitimately a shitty investment

61936897
>>61936320
god i love the famous 2008 whitepaper called 'BITCOIN A PEER TO PEER STORE OF VALUE SYSTEM'
it was supposed to be a currency, and newfags like you destroyed it

61936920
>>61936177
all finance and speculation is fake.

we are here to make money without working nigga, it's all a scam, gold currencies crypto stocks, whatever, if you want something real buy a plot of land.

61937176
>>61936781

61937262
>>61936302
BTC is now used in BTCFI, this is something gold can't achieve. BTC stays native, most especially through babylon and the like. It's more than just BTC but now an asset that can still work for you while you hold

item.title: /pmg/ Pirates Metals Goblins — 85 replies — 26.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
/pmg/ Pirates Metals Goblins

Open thread • Replies: 85 • Updated: 2026-03-04 20:27 UTC

OP

ARR!

Early replies (first 3)

61926222
yarrr

61926235
>>61926222
arr har har harr! get ye telescope and check this shipmate!

61926254
Arrgh matey, IQCHADJEETs Silva stock bussin nigga frfr on kirk nigga

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61929747
>>61929582
People who got rich have multi generational wealth spend money to cause things to fulfil prophesies because they are bored. It works until people catch on and can figure out when they buy and sell stuff. Purim blood moon at 3:33 AM PST? Massive sell off. Sell some of your stocks and before that day especially institutional investor heavy stocks. Then wait for cheapies in things you were eyeing. Just bought a share of an oil stock that dumped. Makes no sense that it would dump when it was showing the start of a long slow upward trajectory before a classic bull run. And that was before the Iran thing. Oil stock are hardly dumping because they shouldn't be. Aware people are buying today while they dump good stocks for no apparent reason because of dumb rituals. I will wait much longer for other things. I know this could go on for years.

61929770
>>61926208
Anyone else remember AYY lmao coin anon?
Had to sell all his coins because of a family emergency like 2 years ago

I still think about this alien coins he had some fucking cool shit
Poor fucker missed the pump

61929916
>>61929486
Anyone ever tried or had luck with refunding from TD precious metals? Shithawking the chart before I send off my email, knowing today it’ll pull some Talmud magic and moon when I ask for a refund/get refunded

61930008
>>61926208
4 March 2027, we meet and see who has the last laugh. You confident?

61931300
>>61930008
2027? absolutely. but you should be in a bunker by then.

61931346
>>61928874
never left, glad to see you too shipmate
>>61928544
this shipmate knows the course.
>>61928696
would buy that coin if i saw it in a shop, gave me a hearty har har!

61931497
kek baggies

61931541
This shit is too jewed, I'm going back to trading natural gas

61931566
kek shaggies

61931581
>>61931541
>fiat brain

61931664
>>61931497
>>61931541
^land lubbers

61931697
OP I have been enjoying your in-character Long John Silver posts.

61931715
>>61931697
it be the way of a pirate, t'be sure. make merry and enjoy life! especially when there be plunder to be had booty to be hoarding! nothing be warming the heart like the glow of gold from within me chest, ARR!

61931989
>>61931715
Yo-Ho
I've restocked the Flying Dutchman Captain

61932481
>>61931989
I regret buying moderately priced gin this week. I will pull out my free whiskey I looted from my relative's liquor cabinet. And yes I did loot. Boomer fag buys liquor faster than he can drink and forgets what he has. He wouldn't miss it. I am telling you Captain Silver, Boomer liquor cabinets have the best forgotten booze to take as booty.

61932523
>>61932481
Good man. Also damn you could be my nephew someday soon I better watch my stash"P

61933973
>>61926208
>OH FUCK SHILLCOIN IS CRASHING
>WE ARE SO BACK
>OH FUCK SHILLCOIN IS CRASHING
>WE ARE SO BACK
Crypto is so fucking volatile, there is going to be a day when it crashes, and it aint coming back.

61935549
>>61931989

61935587
>>61935549
Is there a Captain Morgan in there? Looks like it is all bourbon and whisky. I already have lots of whisky and some bourbon.

61935612
just bought about $1k more silver.
i expect a little dip, but just in case, I'm hoarding some booty now.
check this shipmate again >>61928544 i bought bitcoin in nov 2022, i had a feeling that was the dip. i have the same feeling now about silver. march is the last entry.

61935623
>>61935587
captain morgan is good, but it all does the same job!
ultimate pirate grog: mix one shot of everything you have in a tankard, add 2x as much water, dash of cinnamon and a teaspoon of sugar.

61935778
>>61935623
And not drink that nice booze straight or with the right juice? Yeesh! Does pirate grog go well with a meal of leather belts?

61935853
>>61935778
aye! that be all we had left after the weevil infestation, t'was 20 days from shore and the boots went down well after a few swigs of grog too!

61935915
>>61935587
Sadly some scallywag already drank all the rum.
(It was me):)

61935939
Point of order- on our next alcohol restock the ship needs those mini bottles of rum and other drinks so as to make merry and pretend we're in fact giants drinking normal sized bottles of booze.

61935978
>>61935915
Jack Sparrow is that you? Are you getting better at figuring out why the rum is gone?

61936093
>>61935939
lmao
>>61935915
ever thought about smoking a pipe? the secret key is to blow through it a little too to keep it alight. and the tobaccos you can get- lord i am not worthy, they're so delicious, make cigarettes seem like burning paint by comparison.

61936418
>>61936093
It could be great yeah. But a pipe requires maintenance and upkeep. It's a cool.idea maybe one day:)

61936426
>>61935978
:D

item.title: "Networking" is a waste of time — 49 replies — 25.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
"Networking" is a waste of time

Open thread • Replies: 49 • Updated: 2026-03-04 21:42 UTC

OP

> If you try to network with the rich, they'll laugh at you and go back to their ballgame "DON'T TALK ABOUT WORK PLEASE!"
> Try to network within your friends or family, "Yeah sure I know such and such and they'll let you know!" and you never hear anything back again
> Go to job fairs; "THANK YOU FOR YOUR RESUME! *shakes your hand* YOU CAN APPLY ONLINE AT WWW....NEXT!!!"

Where's the REAL advice on how to make money for once, outside of the memes "get a job" (which btw there are no real entry level jobs anymore) or "just gamble bro" (and end up in the 90%+ lost money statistic).

Sigh.

Early replies (first 3)

61930524
>>61930491
You join forces with other 4channers at a meetup in Miami.

61930527
>>61930491
true

61930539
>>61930491
anon, networking is a euphemism for "sucking cock". You want a job but have little to no experience? go to a bingo night for the elderly. Find the most homosexual old boomer faggot you can find and flirt with him. Be clear adn direct: I'll suck your cock for a job or penetrate you at your whim. Please. Then you land the job. You never noticed Bingo nights are full of 20 year old femboys flirting with old men. Of coarse not, you won't be asking retarded questions about networking here otterwise

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61932381
>>61930491
It'll come to you, you have to figure it out on your own. Just watch the way shit works and it'll become clear.

If you don't have high IQ then you're ngmi

61932389
>>61931936
No one on 4chan is your friend. Anyone you "meet" here is a glownigger who wants to rape you and throw you in federal prison for the rest if your life so they can pin some shit on you that you simply cannot defend against.
This is not the place for making friends, it's the place for exchanging ideas and pondering things.

61932435
>>61930491
Are you ugly?

61932468
Networking is just making friends dumbass. You don’t try to network, your network emerges naturally

61932475
join the masons

61932476
>>61930491
"networking" is just non drug addicts exchanging phone numbers and complimenting each other's chubby wives

61932478
>>61932389
why would a glownigger bother trying to pin shit on a bunch of broke NEETs and send them to prison?

61932680
>>61932478
Because entry level glowniggers need to nail someones ass to prove their worth. Like how spartans had to kill a slave without getting caught, only legalistic.

61932690
>>61930491
networking is the business term for making friends. just be a human and talk to people, dont be needy and expect things from others.

61932775
>>61932680
Most retarded shit I have ever read

61932941
>>61932690
This. "Networking" is just me calling my buddies who are also in software and asking if their work is hiring when I am looking for a new job. They slip my resume in to the boss man past HR, and they get a nice bonus when I get hired. Which I will because I'm also actually good.

61932944
>>61930491
Rich people are just a bunch of retard that waste money in cocaine

61932961
>>61930630
>How to Speedrun The Downfall of Western Civilization

61932998
>>61932389
>This is not the place for making friends
Maybe not for a faggot like you

61933006
>>61932998
>>61932389
Some of my oldest and best friends are from 4chan. Granted, it is a different place these days.

61933012
>>61930491
>If you try to network with the rich, they'll laugh at you and go back to their ballgame "DON'T TALK ABOUT WORK PLEASE!"
You don't understand what networking is.

61933013
>>61933006
There are still a lot of younger people attracted to 4chan for some reason. If you enjoy having friends that might be a decade younger than you they're out there and willing to meet. Just don't bother with /soc/, bunch of homos and retards.

61933089
>>61932775
Whatever man, it's your ass if they're on that shit.

61933121
>>61930630
>Be an Indian who always has energy for endless bullshit but never the spirit to build/innovate
Response is fake but reflects reality. This is how boomers hire and why we're being replaced.

61933152
>>61933013
Nah I stick to the blue boards. /soc/ is fuckin gross.

61933171
>>61930630
>If you don't finish the event energised, at least a dozen business cards in your hand
but i'm always tired, depressed, and i hate to socialize :(

61933249
The networking advice they give to high school and college kids is hilarious. Nobody wants to "network" with some nameless fungible newbie. If you're starting from zero and don't have some kind of edge like a rich uncle or a gigachad face, then networking means befriending other entry level people and keeping up with them so they'll remember you after they move to a new company and get promoted. It takes years, even decades to pay off. If you're lucky you might also impress a manager who will let you ride his coattails as he moves up the corporate ladder, but don't count on that.

61933294
>>61932680
What the fuck is wrong with you

61933544
>>61933294
I am reasonably well seasoned, my (merited) fear of spooks keeps me from doing sketchy shit, like meeting complete and total strangers off of 20th century German literature forums.

Didn't you parents ever tell you not to meet up with strangers off the internet?

61933551
>>61933544
The first time I met people from 4chan it was to get drunk deep inna woods and shoot at dirt with a bunch of firearms. I'm still alive.

61933577
>>61933551
What, 20 years ago before feds and every other bad actor started lingering here looking for someone to exploit like a nigger hanging outside a gas station late at night?

I treat people here like I treat people at work. At arms length. I'll talk with you, but I absolutely do not want to hang out outside of here and I DEFINITELY don't want you knowing my personal business/details. That's how you get murdered and raped.

61933662
>>61933577
Yeah over 15 years ago anyway.

61933702
>>61930491
Join the military and die for Israel

61936871
>>61930957
SEE YOU AT THE BIG PARTY REDDIT

61936887
>>61930491
So why not just build your own business instead? There's safe stock today printing free money on polymarket like betting on no ayy lmaos and no jesus coming back. Work is just a bandaid it won't get you anywhere unless you picked doctor

Open thread • Replies: 18 • Updated: 2026-03-04 22:38 UTC

OP

>losing 50% of your investment in BTC makes you a greater fool

Early replies (first 3)

61936801
Wait, what? Silver has been constantly rallying at least over $82 since the infamous drop from $120 on January 30th. What the actual fuck are you talking about?

61936810
>>61936801
silver fuddies can't do math

61936812
>>61936810
I'm just saying this chart is fucking wrong. It never dropped below the number shown there.

61936822
>>61936801

>THE FIAT VALUATION DOESN'T HECKIN MATTER!

61936828
>>61936822

61936831
>>61936822
>THE FIAT VALUATION DOESN'T HECKIN MATTER!
>it will go to a bajillion one day tho and I'll buy your sister as le sex slave with le mercury dime :^)

61936835
>>61936828
I bought fiat with mine @$103 and oz
can you remind me of the current price?

61936836
The most illegal market manipulation in the history of investing was required to keep it from going straight up endlessly. Buttcoins do these kinds of things organically every day

61936841
>>61936835
You are an ABSOLUTE dumbass. Thanks for letting me know. Enjoy bankrupcty.

61936844
>>61936836
>ITS REAAAAAAALLLL
>BUT DA JOOOEEEES MAKE THE VALUE NOt REAAALLLL
LOLLLLL!

61936851
>>61936841
>make money
>go bankrupt
enjoy holding those bags
ever zoom out and see what happens after these short squeezes? Ever see how long you historically hold a bag for?
>he's going to roundtrip over the course of 3 decades
>but rocks are real tho so its all good
kek
thanks for holding my bag, you silly little greater fool you

61936864
>>61936851
Get fucked you dumbass. I am bussin' onk (on Kirk) and you're losing everything. Keep blaming it on the JIEWS

61936866
>>61936844
What goes around comes around bitch nigger. Enjoy your entire existence being cursed an unable to enjoy anything you gain from ;)

61936881
>>61936864
>>61936866
its ok
i appreciate the exit liquidity. I'm not mad at you. I like you guys.
I will sell you my bags again in a few decades.

61936893
>>61936881
Here's my physical stack even. I also get CONSTANT pussy while you get fucked by some random sandnigger. Keep seething and dilating you cocksucker.

61936933
My average buy in is $25 and yes that includes premiums and shipping so I'm still at 3x. Nothing fundamental has changed in the silver market we are still facing record demand, a 7 year supply deficit and near exhausted stockpiles. Meanwhile paper silver price is becoming increasingly disconnected from physical reality as people realize the blatant price manipulation going on. Soon this house of cards will come tumbling down and you will be tearing your hair out for letting a generational bullrun leave you behind.

61936959
>>61936933
based but we appreciate stack pics more than phone screenshots round here

61937125
>>61936893
>mom help me organize my rock collection, I need to prove to those internet chuds that I totally slay puss...
>NO MOM I DIDN'T CUSS PLEASE PLEASE I'M SORRY
